name: cookbooklm

scripts.package: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path cookbooklm-webstore.zip) { Remove-Item cookbooklm-webstore.zip }; Compress-Archive -Path dist/* -DestinationPath cookbooklm-webstore.zip"

description: Chrome extension for extracting recipes, AI-assisted allergen-aware adaptation, and printable PDFs.
